zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Toothaker於1612年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Richard Toothaker, I26歲，母親Brenda Kay Nelson23歲。他於1634年與Margaret在美國麻薩諸塞州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1638年2月5日在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Toothaker于1612年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Richard Toothaker, I26岁，母亲Brenda Kay Nelson23岁。他于1634年与Margaret在美国马萨诸塞州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1638年2月5日在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯普萊姆斯享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: Toothaker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Swiss German Totenacher, a habitational name (recorded in Konstanz in the 14th century) for someone from Todtnacht in Thurgau, Switzerland.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Toothaker was born in 1612, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Richard Toothaker, I, was 26 and his mother, Brenda Kay Nelson, was 23. He married Margaret in 1634, in Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 5 February 1638, in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Toothaker est né en 1612, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Toothaker, I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Brenda Kay Nelson, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret en 1634, à Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 février 1638, à Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Toothaker 1612 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Toothaker, I 26 und seine Mutter Brenda Kay Nelson 23. Er hat 1634 in Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. Februar 1638 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Toothaker è nato il nel 1612 nel London, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Richard Toothaker, I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Brenda Kay Nelson, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret nel 1634, nel Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 febbraio 1638, nel Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 26 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Toothaker(이)가 1612년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Toothaker, I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Brenda Kay Nelson(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1634년 미국 매사추세츠 주에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1638년 2월 5일 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 플림우스에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Toothaker nasceu em 1612, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Toothaker, I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Brenda Kay Nelson, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret em 1634, em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1638, em Plymouth, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Toothaker родился в 1612 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Toothaker, I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Brenda Kay Nelson, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret в 1634 г. в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 5 февраля 1638 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 26 лет.
